name: and
description: Logical AND over an array of conditions. Returns true if every condition is truthy.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve a value dynamically.

conditions.description: Array of conditions to evaluate. Each condition may be a boolean literal, a truthy/falsy value (number, string), or a DynamicString referencing a data model path. All conditions are coerced to boolean via Boolean().
